verdict.note: M4 L3 foundation, LIVE on real AWS (non-prod dev acct, us-west-2). Three free-tier stacks deployed via the M4 CDK and left running for future validation: (1) Guardrail really intervened + masked a fake AWS key + sk- token in a tool response; (2) Cognito identity (user pool + resource server + domain + human/M2M clients) with a reachable OIDC discovery endpoint (RS256, token_endpoint) that gateway.cognito_jwt_authorizer() wires into a CUSTOM_JWT gateway; (3) CloudWatch dashboard + TokensPerScenario metric + monthly Budgets alarm. The private-VPC PrivateLink interface endpoints (the only standing ~$30/mo cost) stay cost-gated OFF by default (-c sentinel:deployVpcEndpoints=true opts in). IDs/account scrubbed.
